title: pedicularis jainii
intro: Pedicularis jainii is a species of flowering plant in the family Orobanchaceae, commonly known as the balsam or lousewort plant. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pedicularis jainii are believed to include the reduction of fever, relief from respiratory issues, and the treatment of digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
